summary: Breaking news top banner, tmux attach short names, and session destroy.

introduced: Destroy button on each tmux session row attaches, sends exit, and closes the session
Breaking news alerts appear as a macOS-style top banner in every workspace section
changed: Breaking news no longer blocks the full screen — slides in from the top and auto-dismisses after 20 seconds
tmux attach and copy commands use the short session title (for example hugeshop-ci) instead of the full timestamped name
News feed keeps running outside Dashboard so breaking news can appear from any workspace
